repair_history.diagnosis:
The variable 'actual_update' on the left side of equation is of type 'real' but must be of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl': Type mismatch in equation declaration -> Change 'actual_update : real' to 'actual_update : Types::speed.speed_impl'
left and right sides of binary expression '+' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Incompatible operand types in arithmetic expression -> Cast 'Actuator_Input' to 'Types::speed.speed_impl' using a conversion or declare it as compatible type
left side of binary expression '+' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type 'int' or 'real': Invalid operand types for arithmetic operation -> Ensure both operands of '+' are of compatible numeric type
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in guarantee statement -> Ensure 'Actual' and 'actual_update' have matching types

left and right sides of binary expression '+' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in arithmetic expression: Actual is of type Types::speed.speed_impl, Actuator_Input is of type Base_Types::Float -> Change the type of actual_update to Base_Types::Float to match the type of Actuator_Input

The variable 'actual_update' on the left side of equation is of type 'real' but must be of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl': Type mismatch in equation declaration -> Change the type of 'actual_update' from 'Base_Types::Float' to 'Types::speed.speed_impl'
left and right sides of binary expression '+' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Incompatible types in arithmetic operation -> Cast 'Actuator_Input' to 'Types::speed.speed_impl' or convert 'pre(Actual)' to 'real' for arithmetic
left side of binary expression '+' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type 'int' or 'real': Invalid operation on opaque type -> Ensure all operands in arithmetic are of compatible numeric types
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in guarantee statement -> Ensure 'Actual' and 'actual_update' have matching types

left and right sides of binary expression '+' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in arithmetic expression: Actual is of type Types::speed.speed_impl, Actuator_Input is Base_Types::Float -> Change the type of the equation to match the actual port type by casting or redefining the expression to use compatible types

The variable 'actual_update' on the left side of equation is of type 'real' but must be of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl': Type mismatch in equation declaration: 'actual_update' is declared as 'real' but should match the port type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' -> Change 'eq actual_update : real' to 'eq actual_update : Types::speed.speed_impl'
left and right sides of binary expression '+' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Incompatible types in arithmetic operation: 'pre(Actual)' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and '0.1 * Actuator_Input' is of type 'real' -> Cast 'pre(Actual)' to 'real' or convert 'Actuator_Input' to 'Types::speed.speed_impl' to match types; prefer casting 'pre(Actual)' to 'real'
left side of binary expression '+' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type 'int' or 'real': Invalid operand type for '+' operator: 'pre(Actual)' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' which is not a numeric type -> Cast 'pre(Actual)' to 'real' to enable arithmetic operation
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in guarantee statement: 'Actual' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but 'actual_update' is of type 'real' -> Ensure 'actual_update' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' to match 'Actual' port type
